steps.title: Focus on methodology
steps.content: The student wants the research methodology, meaning how the study was conducted. The relevant notes describe two tested groups: seeds ingested by Jamaican fruit bats and control seeds that had not been ingested.

steps.title: Separate method from findings
steps.content: Choice A reports a comparative result. Choice C gives the research aim. Choice D reports one germination outcome. The methodological sentence describes both 120-seed groups that the researchers tested. The answer is B.
